title: Iran Navy claims targeting US destroyer command center in Gulf of Oman — CENTCOM denies: 'Iran is lying'
snippet: Iran Navy announced it had targeted a US destroyer's 'command and control centre' in the Gulf of Oman. CENTCOM dismissed the claim: 'Iran is lying. U.S. military assets at sea continue to fly, sail, and operate safely and unimpeded.' No independent verification of the attack. Information warfare event with competing narratives.
tag_reason: 신규 사건 — 이란 해군의 미 구축함 타격 주장과 CENTCOM의 정면 부인. 검증 불가능한 상충 주장으로, 양측의 정보전(information warfare) 사례

entities.name: Iran Navy Gulf of Oman Destroyer Claim (Jun 3)
